zh.lifeSummary: 當Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing於從1338年到1369年出生在艾歐洛時，他的父親Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing64歲，母親Isabeau Marie de Montigny61歲。他於1395年與Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1441年1月13日，埋葬在法國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing于从1338年到1369年出生在艾歐洛时，他的父亲Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing64岁，母亲Isabeau Marie de Montigny61岁。他于1395年与Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1441年1月13日，埋葬在法国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Othon
meanings: Some translate Otho 'happy' and Otto 'rich;' but they would seem to be the same name, for Otho of Freysingen, son of Leopold, Margrave of Austria, and of Agnes, daughter of the Emperor Henry IV., is also called Otto. It was the surname of a Roman emperor, and of one of the Roscian family; It comes from Old German od, excelling, happy, fortunate.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing was born from 1338 to 1369, in Europe, his father, Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, was 64 and his mother, Isabeau Marie de Montigny, was 61. He married Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes in 1395, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 13 January 1441, and was buried in France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing est né du 1338 au 1369, à Europe, son père, Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, avait 64 ans et sa mère, Isabeau Marie de Montigny, avait 61 ans. Il a épousé Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes en 1395, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 13 janvier 1441, et a été enterré à France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing von 1338 bis 1369 in Europa geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing 64 und seine Mutter Isabeau Marie de Montigny 61. Er hat 1395 in Europa Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 13. Januar 1441 und wurde in Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing è nato il da 1338 a 1369 nel Europa, il suo padre, Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, aveva 64 anni e il suo madre, Isabeau Marie de Montigny, aveva 61 anni. Lui sposato Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes nel 1395, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 13 gennaio 1441, e fu sepolto a Francia.

ja.Vianen, South Holland, Netherlands: オランダズイド-hオランドヴィアンン
ja.lifeSummary: Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaingがから1338年まで1369年にヨーロッパで生まれた時，父Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaingは64歳，母Isabeau Marie de Montignyは61歳であった。1395年にヨーロッパでJolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1441年1月13日に死去し，フランスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing(이)가 1338년 부터 1369년 까지 우럽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing(은)는 64세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabeau Marie de Montigny(은)는 61세였다. 그는 1395년 우럽에서 Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1441년 1월 13일 사망했으며 프랑스에 묻혔다.

lv.from 1338 to 1369–13 January 1441: no 1338. gada līdz 1369. gadam–1441. gada 13. janvāris

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing nasceu de 1338 a 1369, em Europa, seu pai, Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, tinha 64 anos e sua mãe, Isabeau Marie de Montigny, tinha 61 anos. Ele casou-se com Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes em 1395, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 13 de janeiro de 1441, e foi sepultado em França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing родился с 1338 по 1369 в местности Европа, его отцу по имени Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing было 64 года, а матери, которую звали Isabeau Marie de Montigny, 61. Он женился на женщине по имени Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes в 1395 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 13 января 1441 г. и был похоронен в местности Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Othon II de Lallaing, Seigneur de Lalaing nació desde 1338 hasta 1369, en Europa, su papá, Nicolas III de Lalaing, Seigneur de Lalaing, tenía 64 años y su mamá, Isabeau Marie de Montigny, tenía 61 años. Se casó con Jolande de Barbençon, Dame de Hantes en 1395, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 13 de enero de 1441, y fue sepultado en Francia.
